subcodes.first_line: O Diya! It is incumbent upon thee, throughout the journey, to be a close, a constant and cheerful companion to my honoured and distinguished sister.
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ضیاء در این سفر باید با دلی خرم و روح و ریحانی محکم همدم حضرت شقیقه باشی
subcodes.subjects: @personal instructions, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @sacrifice of self; mystery of sacrifice, @love of God
